title: Cooking
description: Weeknight recipes I actually make. Stir-fries, pasta, and rice bowls that fit a small kitchen and a busy week.

title: Go & Systems
description: Go talks and distributed systems deep-dives. Concurrency, consensus, databases, and backend design I keep coming back to.

description: Mechanical keyboard build guides, switch and keycap breakdowns, and sound tests. For the next board.

description: The graveyard. Stuff I will definitely get to eventually.

description: Self-hosting, Kubernetes, and homelab setups for the cluster running Ridgeline.

title: PC Build Reference
description: GPU comparisons and build guides I saved while researching the RTX 4070 rig.

title: Postgres Deep Dives
description: Query planning, indexing, MVCC, and connection pooling talks. The database I reach for at work and at home.

title: AWS & Cloud Infra
description: EKS, RDS, and IAM walkthroughs that helped me get up to speed on our cloud setup at Ridgeline.

title: Lofi & Focus
description: Long lofi and ambient mixes I leave on while I'm heads-down coding.

title: Gaming Sessions
description: Factorio, Elden Ring, and the odd co-op night. Stuff I unwind with after work.

title: Python Tooling
description: Scripting, packaging, and CLI tool talks for the times Python beats Go for me.

title: Conference Talks
description: Saved GopherCon and Strange Loop talks I want to rewatch or share at the Seattle Go meetup.

title: Neovim & Dotfiles
description: Editor setups, plugin walkthroughs, and terminal workflows I borrow from for my dotfiles.

title: On-Call & Incident Response
description: Postmortems, runbook talks, and observability sessions to prep for my on-call rotations.

title: Ridgeline Build Log
description: Clips and references I pulled while building offline sync and search for ridgelinesystems.com.

title: Hiking & Trails
description: PNW trail guides and trip reports for weekend hikes around the Cascades and Rainier.

title: Coffee at Home
description: Pour-over and espresso dial-in videos for the home setup, plus a few Seattle roaster tours.

title: Docker & Containers
description: Multi-stage builds, image slimming, and registry tips for the services I run at home.

title: Career Notes
description: Talks on growing as a junior engineer, code review, and working on a team. Saved for the slow days.

title: Networking & Self-Hosting
description: VLANs, reverse proxies, Tailscale, and Caddy guides for keeping the homelab reachable and safe.

title: Music Mix
description: Indie and electronic tracks on repeat lately. Less for focus, more for the bus ride.
